steps.t: Weapon-racks and crates of supplies can be found in Ashúrz Maufulug, to the south and a little west of Echad Glamodúd. Glamodúd has asked you to furth…
Glamodúd is at Echad Glamodúd, south and a little west from Ashúrz Maufulug. You should return to Ashúrz Maufulug with news of your success.
